sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76685" key="paiktiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παικ-τικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n76685.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">playful, sportive</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὸ π</foreign>. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0654.tlg002:27" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Corn.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">ND</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">27</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
